sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Snowpack Lab alpine-risk balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on slope-selection clarity, snow-layer readability, test-cost differentiation, confidence feedback, weather-shift fairness, hazard-rating calibration, route-risk tradeoffs, narrow-screen controls, keyboard slope navigation, adaptive-route unlock pacing, and whether helicopter resupply enables recovery without erasing credibility consequences.

queue.title: Bindery Bench bookbinding balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on signature sequencing clarity, paper-grain feedback, stitch and cover differentiation, glue and tension tradeoffs, press-time value, stock and coin pressure, narrow-screen controls, keyboard slot navigation, linen-cover unlock pacing, and whether the remnant kit enables recovery without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Spectrum Control radio-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on channel-assignment clarity, adjacent-channel interference, priority weighting, scan value, transmitter-power pressure, hidden-noise fairness, narrow-screen density, keyboard navigation, narrow-filter unlock pacing, and whether emergency reroute enables recovery without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Kiln Keeper ceramics balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on shelf-loading clarity, clay and glaze compatibility, heat and oxygen feedback, ramp and soak value, fuel pressure, mobile slider density, keyboard shelf navigation, soda-ash unlock pacing, and whether emergency refire enables recovery without erasing trust and coin consequences.

queue.title: Choreo Grid movement-language and path-risk playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on movement-language differentiation, path-line readability, crossing-conflict fairness, undo discoverability, center-spotlight scoring, narrow-screen controls, keyboard focus, canon pacing, and whether rehearsal reset remains useful without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Pit Wall race-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on weather readability, tire differentiation, fuel-mode value, pit-loss clarity, mobile controls, keyboard tire selection, intermediate unlock pacing, and whether the safety-car gamble enables recovery without erasing strategy consequences.

queue.title: Stage Rig theater-lighting balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on fixture differentiation, grid placement clarity, cue scoring, power and heat pressure, keyboard navigation, narrow-screen cell density, prism-mover pacing, and whether swing-crew recovery remains useful without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Type Foundry editorial-composition playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on brief clarity, type-system differentiation, hierarchy scoring, density and contrast feedback, narrow-screen range controls, SVG proof readability, variable-axis pacing, and whether the press check supports recovery without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Tea Atelier sensory-balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on brief clarity, ingredient differentiation, temperature and steep-time feedback, inventory pressure, narrow-screen sliders, keyboard selection, prism-rose pacing, and whether the reserve tin supports recovery without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Pattern Table garment-layout balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on piece-selection clarity, rotation discoverability, defect fairness, grain scoring, narrow-screen cell density, keyboard cursor behavior, bias-cut pacing, and whether the remnant-roll recovery supports recovery without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Foley Workshop sound-design balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on recipe readability, timing windows, layer value, audio distinction, keyboard selection, narrow-screen density, precision-mic pacing, and whether the director reset supports recovery without erasing trust consequences.

queue.title: Exposure Lab photography balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on exposure feedback clarity, shutter-motion mapping, aperture-depth mapping, ISO noise penalties, composition differentiation, narrow-screen sliders, canvas readability, stabilized-lens pacing, and whether the reshoot recovery remains useful without erasing confidence consequences.

recentDecisions.title: Snowpack Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared an alpine snowpack forecaster, an observatory scheduler, and a mediation simulator. Prioritized Snowpack Lab because representative slope selection, layered snow evidence, test allocation, changing weather, calibrated hazard ratings, route-risk tradeoffs, confidence, credibility, scoring, a session unlock, failure, and one costly resupply add an underserved environmental-inference strategy loop.
checks: Slope, layer, weather, test and route accounting
Time, confidence, credibility and score tradeoffs
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Bindery Bench 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a bookbinding workshop, a botanical grafting workshop, and a courtroom evidence-sequencing game. Prioritized Bindery Bench because signature sequencing, paper grain, stitch and cover compatibility, glue, tension, press time, material inventory, coins, trust, scoring, a session unlock, failure, and one costly recovery add an underserved tactile publishing-craft strategy loop.
checks: Signature, grain, stitch, cover, glue, tension and press accounting
Stock, coins, trust and score tradeoffs
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Spectrum Control 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a radio-spectrum coordinator, a botanical grafting workshop, and a courtroom evidence-sequencing game. Prioritized Spectrum Control because simultaneous channel assignment, adjacent-channel interference, changing hidden noise, priority traffic, transmitter power, scans, trust, scoring, a session unlock, failure, and one costly reroute add an underserved communications-allocation strategy loop.
checks: Channel, power, priority and interference accounting
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Kiln Keeper 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a ceramics kiln simulator, a bookbinding workshop, and a radio-spectrum coordinator. Prioritized Kiln Keeper because spatial shelf loading, clay and glaze compatibility, staged heat-work, atmosphere, fuel, defects, delayed firing outcomes, trust, scoring, a session unlock, failure, and one costly refire add an underserved material-transformation strategy loop rather than another routing or performance-production game.
checks: Clay, glaze, heat, oxygen, ramp and soak accounting
Fuel, coins, trust and score tradeoffs
Responsive animated kiln and shelf grid
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring
